title: Europe should pick negotiator for possible Russian talks, says Zelenskyy – Europe live
summary_full: Ukrainian president says Europe must ‘have a strong voice and presence’ amid search for candidate who could lead any talks with PutinElsewhere, we are getting a line from Rome, with the Italian foreign ministry confirming that rescuers have located the bodies of four Italian divers believed to be deep inside an underwater cave in a Maldive atoll, AP reported.Five Italian divers are believed to have died while exploring a cave at a depth of about 50 meters in Vaavu Atoll on Thursday, according to Italy’s foreign ministry, way below the recreational diving limit of 30 meters.
